query: AAPM TG-229 brachytherapy source strength standards report

results.title: A generic high-dose rate (192)Ir brachytherapy source for evaluation of model-based dose calculations beyond the TG-43 formalism.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 26127057. 2015/06/01 00:00. PURPOSE: In order to facilitate a smooth transition for brachytherapy dose 
calculations from the American Association of Physicists in Medicine (AAPM) Task 
Group No. 43 (TG-43) formalism to model-based dose calculation algorithms 
(MBDCAs), treatment planning systems (TPSs) using a MBDCA require a set of 
well-defined test case plans characterized by Monte Carlo (MC) methods. This 
also permits direct dose comparison to TG-43 reference data. Such test cas
